case_title: SEAN CLANCY VS. THE DOGGIEDAY GROUP,INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLANCY, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT THE DOGGIEDAY GROUP,INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLANCY, SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE DOGGIEDAY GROUP,INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION $1,781.19 PRINCIPAL, $2.56 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,963.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
